title: Senior Software Engineer - Vodafone Idea - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Vodafone Idea - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Senior Software Engineer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!
